description: A collapsible container with a disclosure chevron and a title. Supports static children or data-driven template mode.

children.description: Static child views shown when expanded

template.description: Template rendered once per data row; set rows via setElementRows

states.isExpanded.description: Current expanded state; write to expand/collapse programmatically

states.content.description: All rows in template mode as [[String]]; use getElementRows/setElementRows
